footer.tagline: The next-gen cloud gaming platform. One account, thousands of games, seamless play across every device.

slides.title: Neon Abyss
slides.desc: Dive into a city that never sleeps and shoot your way through bullets and neon. Roguelike × bullet-hell — every run is a brand-new adventure.

slides.kicker: Game of the Year · Open World
slides.title: Astral Rift
slides.desc: An epic open world spanning seven star systems. Pilot your ship to trade, fight, and uncover the ruins of unknown civilizations.

slides.title: Mech Vanguard
slides.desc: 5v5 team combat with one-of-a-kind mech warriors, where victory is decided in milliseconds. Top the global ranks and win the million-dollar pool.

feat.sub: Powerful cloud computing turns any device into a gaming console. Say goodbye to downloads, updates, and hardware worries — just enjoy the game.

items.title: Instant Cloud Play
items.desc: No downloads, no high-end specs — launch AAA titles instantly, streamed at up to 4K 120fps.

items.title: Cross-Device Relay
items.desc: Switch seamlessly across PC, phone, tablet, and TV, with progress synced to the cloud.

items.title: Achievements & Ranks
items.desc: A unified achievement system across the platform — top the global leaderboards and earn exclusive rewards.

items.title: Community & Squads
items.desc: Built-in voice, parties, streaming, and friend feeds — team up with millions of players.

cta.titleSuf: and play the whole gaming universe
cta.sub: Dozens of new blockbusters every month — cloud play, exclusive discounts, and early access, all in one price.

hero.sub: NEXUS is a cloud gaming platform founded by hardcore gamers. We believe great games shouldn't be bound by hardware, downloads, or borders — whenever you want to play, play instantly, anywhere.

mission.p1: Playing AAA titles once meant expensive hardware, endless downloads, and constant updates. We broke through all of it with cloud computing.
mission.p2: Today, a single phone is your gaming console. This is a new era of gaming for every player.

values.title: The four beliefs that drive us

items.title: Players First
items.desc: Every decision starts with "is this better for players?"

items.title: Peak Experience
items.desc: Push latency to the limit, push visuals to the peak.

items.title: Open Co-Creation
items.desc: Build with developers so great games reach more people.

items.title: Fair & Secure
items.desc: Anti-cheat and privacy protection guard a clean gaming space.

timeline.title: From a garage to the world

items.text: The team wrote its first line of streaming code in a garage — NEXUS was born.
The cloud gaming beta launched, drawing in the first 100,000 players.
NEXUS+ membership went live; the library surpassed 2,000 games.
Hosted the first NEXUS global esports finals with a million-dollar pool.
Players surpassed 120 million across 30+ global edge nodes.

hero.sub: Whether it's a game issue, a partnership, or bringing your game to NEXUS — leave your details and we'll get back to you soon.

form.title: Send us a message
form.name: Nickname *
form.messagePlaceholder: Briefly describe your question or idea…
form.validation: Please fill in your nickname, contact, and message.
form.successDesc: Thanks {name}, our team will reach out to you soon.
